summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard; each open PR is independent and should stay open for normal maintainer review rather than backlog closeout.

actions.reason: Independent open PR in an inventory shard; no duplicate, supersession, low-signal, or security-sensitive basis for closure.
Independent open PR needing normal re-review; failing proof blocks any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout and there is no close basis.
Independent open PR with author/review follow-up pending; no safe duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or fixed-by-candidate close action is supported.
Independent open PR with author follow-up and failed proof; no close-style action is justified by the hydrated artifact.
Independent open PR in a live inventory shard; green checks support maintainer review, not automated closeout.
